attacking_style: Opportunistic early mover who bridges to elite attacks rather than initiating solo moves. Willing to animate racing but operates within team constraints.
team_tactics: INEOS deploys him as an aggressive element to disrupt opponents, but overall team defensive posture limits his freedom to fully commit to attacks.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages where he can exploit early moves and force rivals to respond. Capable TT rider willing to test equipment in stage race conditions.
vulnerability: Crash susceptibility and injury management in stage races; effectiveness curtailed when team prioritizes defensive tactics over offensive racing.
key_patterns: Bridges to attacks from GC favorites creating dangerous combinations (Tour 2022, early move to Pogačar)
Team deploys him aggressively but defensive strategy limits full commitment (Tour 2022, multiple stages)
Used for technical testing and race reconnaissance within stage race contexts (Suisse TT bike prototype)
Injury management concerns after crashes impact stage race participation (Vuelta 2020 ankle complaint)
form_trajectory: neutral: Active in 2022 Tour animations but constrained by team tactics; no clear upward or downward performance trend evident
